issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://animevietsub.site/phim/cong-chien-tranh-ss2-a1052/tap-12end-15072.html](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fanimevietsub.site%2Fphim%2Fcong-chien-tranh-ss2-a1052%2Ftap-12end-15072.html) ### Comment > The website detects users using adblockers. Normally the problem is solved by reloading the site. But this time this method didn't work, tried blocking elements that detect adblocker but they seems to nested the main element(the thing user wanted to see) inside the adblock detector so the main element is blocked along side with the detector. > To reproduce this problem, you must either accessing the website using Vietnam IP or answer the verification question for foreign IP, the answers for each questions are: > 1. 20/11 > 2. đồng > 3. 5 > 4. Việt Nam > 5. Bác Hồ > Then try to watch any anime, the warning appears. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/o35ffqkauysg008004ckwc0s4c048wcs7qf1er8ya8.png?nc=1)

comment.body: The issue is already fixed. Unfortunately, MV3 extension cannot update filters due to Google policy, so new rules will be available in one of the next extension updates.

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: T: Social Widget
labels.description: Social widgets, share, like buttons and popups

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

issue.title: www.gutefrage.net

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body: Did you try the updated installation guide of tinyShield for iOS Safari?

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 20, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to await the next update of AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 itself. Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://www.paramountplus.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.paramountplus.com%2F)

### Comment
> I am using 94.140.14.14 and 94.140.15.15 for DNS on my router and dns.adguard-dns.com on my android phone.  Recently we have starting experiencing issues with the android and streaming device apps for Paramount Plus, though they worked without issue in the past.  I don't use this app regularly, though fairly sure I had used it about 4-6 weeks ago without any issues. I do have an ad free account with Paramount Plus, though they often play an advertisement for their content before a program starts. 
> 
> There's no issue browsing to Paramount Plus via the web and watching videos.  I am also able to navigate the site without issue within the Paramount plus app on the phone or streaming device until I attempt to play a video which then sits at a blank window until eventually failing. If I do not use the AdGuard DNS filter playing video in the Paramount Plus apps works without issue.  If you need any additional information from me, or have anything you would like me to try, feel free to let me know.
> 

```
Username: @TheCarsForever
```


### Screenshots

  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>

You can send the credentials to filters@adguard.com with steps to reproduce in detail. Write the task number and specify that this is for Paramount Plus.
Meanwhile did you test the rules? You can also unblock the requests via recent activity to see which one helps.

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://billbill.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fbillbill.com%2F) ### Comment > #概述 > 此问题由“拦截 ETag 和 If - None - Match 标头”功能造成，关闭后恢复正常。 > > ##已造成的问题（**以复现成功率，从高到低排序**） > 1. 非AD营销界面无法加载，即使相关过滤器已关闭。 > 2. 其他用户的个人空间无法加载。 > 3. 视频/直播加载失败，或相关功能（如评论、点赞）不可用，即使相关过滤器已关闭。 > 4. 视频刷新失败。 > 5. 主页加载失败。 > > ###附注 > 1. 已尝试使用AdGuard DNS 私人服务器，并对本地与服务器过滤日志进行审查。除部分域名被错误屏蔽外（*正式测试与审查前已加入白名单*），未发现过滤器问题。 > 2. 以下议题可能与此问题有关: > -#229486. > -#229490. > --AdGuardTeam/AdGuardDNS#1023 ``` Username: @Tayg2048 ``` ### Screenshots

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 20, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to await the next update of AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 itself. Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/List-KR/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/List-KR/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/List-KR/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

<details>
<summary>Detailed description for iOS users</summary>

1. Install [**Usercripts**](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/userscripts/id1463298887) app
2. Enable **Usercripts** extension in Safari settings
	* iOS 18+: `System settings` => `Apps` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	* iOS 17 and older: `System settings` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	Find **Usercripts**, enable it and allow `On other sites` permission
4. Open the [tinyShield ](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@list-kr/tinyshield@latest/dist/tinyShield.user.js) userscript URL in browser
5. Press the extensions icon in the address bar of Safari and select Userscripts 
6. Tap to install
7. In opened popup, scroll down and press Install button
8. Done.

</details>

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/List-KR/tinyShield/issues).

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 20, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to await the next update of AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 itself. Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 20, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to await the next update of AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 itself. Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

issue.body: ### Prerequisites - [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer; - [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed; - [x] This is not an ad/bug report. ### Problem description Fake websites like Exodus Wallet, Safepal Wallet, and Tronlink Wallet need to be blocked immediately. They steal users' seed phrases daily and use cloaking. They were previously banned, and for unknown reasons, it was lifted. How is this possible? Please do not protect these scammers. You can access scam content through Bing, as they are cloaking. https://safepal.com.co/ https://tronlink.com.co/ https://exodus.com.ag/ Virustotal report: https://www.virustotal.com/gui/url/694e015657f63f4aa883e6186031b8e4acfa950a756e446a4dc2b6627617e7be (exodus.com.ag) https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/tronlink.com.co (tronlink.com.co) https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/safepal.com.co (safepal.com.co) ### Proposed solution There are a huge number of detections everywhere, but the domain registrar doesn't block it and covers it up, since most likely they are in cahoots with it! ### Additional information

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://t-bank-app.su/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Ft-bank-app.su%2F) ### Comment > Сообщаю о ложном срабатывании механизма защиты, связанного с правилом «Защита от тайпсквоттинга». > > Домен: `t-bank-app.su` > Данный домен является официальным доменом Т-Банка и используется для работы мобильного приложения. > > Проблема: > При попытке открытия приложения доступ блокируется, так как домен попадает под действие правила защиты от тайпсквоттинга. В результате приложение не может корректно установить соединение с сервером. > > Дополнительно сообщаю, что проблема воспроизводится как при использовании частного DNS-сервера, так и при проверке через публичный DNS-сервер — в обоих случаях домен ошибочно определяется как подозрительный и блокируется. ``` Username: @StepsOnes ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/ort8l8zn6dwso080ss80g0ww4kk0ckgib2w8zyh588.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/beekdnx3zsowosk4okgocc4ook00owwgfx9xvd05y8.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/1xkjm6nj2nwg88k004k0gkgg0sgokwsqon0vxw9frk.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS DNS setup: | Router DNS server: | Private Browser: | Safari Blocklists: | **AdGuard:**
AdGuard DNS filter

comment.body:
> [@StepsOnes](https://github.com/StepsOnes) Здравствуйте! Сейчас это еще есть? У себя не наблюдаю блокировки домена с включенной защитой от тайпсквоттинга.

Добрый день!. Да, к сожалению, проблема сохраняется, см. скриншот ниже.

Возможно, у вас она не воспроизводится, поскольку Т-Банк в своем приложении может использовать другой домен. По открытым источникам нашел информацию, что из‑за проблем с SSL-сертификацией в приложении задействовано несколько доменов:
1. ```t-bank-app.ru```
2. ```t-bank-app.su```
3. ```tbank.ru```

Когда устройство не может получить SSL с ```tbank.ru```, то приложение использует фоллбеки, которые AdGuard блокирует :)

<details>
  <summary>Скриншот</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ef432342-0144-469e-96a2-5dde8379cd62)
</details>

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
@snhv I can't register. 
If the app is not broken by AdGuard DNS, you may install the nightly build (backup your settings). It has export filtering log option. Close the Global TV app, clear the log, reproduce the problem, and export the filtering log in Recent Activity.

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://t-bank-app.su/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Ft-bank-app.su%2F) ### Comment > Сообщаю о ложном срабатывании механизма защиты, связанного с правилом «Защита от тайпсквоттинга». > > Домен: `t-bank-app.su` > Данный домен является официальным доменом Т-Банка и используется для работы мобильного приложения. > > Проблема: > При попытке открытия приложения доступ блокируется, так как домен попадает под действие правила защиты от тайпсквоттинга. В результате приложение не может корректно установить соединение с сервером. > > Дополнительно сообщаю, что проблема воспроизводится как при использовании частного DNS-сервера, так и при проверке через публичный DNS-сервер — в обоих случаях домен ошибочно определяется как подозрительный и блокируется. ``` Username: @StepsOnes ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/ort8l8zn6dwso080ss80g0ww4kk0ckgib2w8zyh588.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/beekdnx3zsowosk4okgocc4ook00owwgfx9xvd05y8.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/1xkjm6nj2nwg88k004k0gkgg0sgokwsqon0vxw9frk.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS DNS setup: | Router DNS server: | Private Browser: | Safari Blocklists: | **AdGuard:**
AdGuard DNS filter

There were few similar reports recently (https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/231142, https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/230908, https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/230890#issuecomment-4444243052), but I couldn't reproduce it.
I don't see any new similar reports, so perhaps it was temporary issue.

### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard for Android

### AdGuard version

4.12

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

other (specify in comment below)

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://www.globaltv.com/

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

_No response_

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

_No response_

### Security

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

AdGuard DNS filter

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

This is an issue with Adguard for Android TV.
Global TV app (https://www.globaltv.com/) cannot stream when adblocking is turned on. If I turned off adblocking but still have DNS blocking, stream works as normal.

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

issue.title: www.yahoo.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
> On this computer going to yahoo.com the top banner and side ads show, as well as within any internal pages.
> 
> I run adguard on my laptop and I do not have this issue, and I have the exact same version, settings, filters. Both are running on Safari. I have tried uninstalling adguard and re-installing.

Please show the HTTPS certificate issuer on the site when ads are not blocked.

issue.title: www.gutefrage.net

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 20, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to await the next update of AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 itself. Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://t-bank-app.su/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Ft-bank-app.su%2F) ### Comment > Сообщаю о ложном срабатывании механизма защиты, связанного с правилом «Защита от тайпсквоттинга». > > Домен: `t-bank-app.su` > Данный домен является официальным доменом Т-Банка и используется для работы мобильного приложения. > > Проблема: > При попытке открытия приложения доступ блокируется, так как домен попадает под действие правила защиты от тайпсквоттинга. В результате приложение не может корректно установить соединение с сервером. > > Дополнительно сообщаю, что проблема воспроизводится как при использовании частного DNS-сервера, так и при проверке через публичный DNS-сервер — в обоих случаях домен ошибочно определяется как подозрительный и блокируется. ``` Username: @StepsOnes ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/ort8l8zn6dwso080ss80g0ww4kk0ckgib2w8zyh588.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/beekdnx3zsowosk4okgocc4ook00owwgfx9xvd05y8.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/1xkjm6nj2nwg88k004k0gkgg0sgokwsqon0vxw9frk.jpg?nc=1)

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://t-bank-app.su/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Ft-bank-app.su%2F) ### Comment > Сообщаю о ложном срабатывании механизма защиты, связанного с правилом «Защита от тайпсквоттинга». > > Домен: `t-bank-app.su` > Данный домен является официальным доменом Т-Банка и используется для работы мобильного приложения. > > Проблема: > При попытке открытия приложения доступ блокируется, так как домен попадает под действие правила защиты от тайпсквоттинга. В результате приложение не может корректно установить соединение с сервером. > > Дополнительно сообщаю, что проблема воспроизводится как при использовании частного DNS-сервера, так и при проверке через публичный DNS-сервер — в обоих случаях домен ошибочно определяется как подозрительный и блокируется. ``` Username: @StepsOnes ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/ort8l8zn6dwso080ss80g0ww4kk0ckgib2w8zyh588.jpg?nc=1)

comment.body:
https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/231213#issue-4442141609 - I cannot reproduce it.

<hr>

https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/231213#issuecomment-4466213893 and https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/231213#issuecomment-4485678522

This issue is known to be solved with [AdGuard Extra](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardExtra) userscript.

If you’re using AdGuard for Windows, Mac or Android, please make sure that AdGuard Extra is enabled in the application settings.

If you’re using AdGuard Browser Extension, we suggest installing AdGuard Extra in addition to it.

* [Install for Chrome, Edge or other Chromium-based browsers](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_chrome_release)
* [Install for Firefox](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_firefox_release)

Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/ort8l8zn6dwso080ss80g0ww4kk0ckgib2w8zyh588.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/beekdnx3zsowosk4okgocc4ook00owwgfx9xvd05y8.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/1xkjm6nj2nwg88k004k0gkgg0sgokwsqon0vxw9frk.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS DNS setup: | Router DNS server: | Private Browser: | Safari Blocklists: | **AdGuard:**
AdGuard DNS filter
